chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P.No.S-632of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 09.09.2022 Mr. Muhammad Nawaz Chang advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Addl. A.G Sindh. Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, APG. ----- Statements / comments filed on behalf of respondents No.2 to 4 are taken on record. Petitioners are seeking protection against alleged harassment by the respondents. Learned AAG and APG undertake to provide protection to the petitioners as and when required in accordance with law. Learned counsel for the petitioners is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition in the above terms, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
